title: Admin Password Configuration
description: The password of the management account may be updated once. This account must already exist on the appliance and have sufficient permission to complete all of the configuration required. These properties are overridden by `IVIA_MGMT_*` environment variables

mgmt_user.description: Administrator user to run configuration as.

mgmt_pwd.description: Secret to authenticate as the Administrator user.

mgmt_old_pwd.description: Password to update for the Administrator user.
